evals.prompt: Compare the latest published developer pricing pages for OpenAI API, Anthropic API, and Gemini API as of today. Produce a markdown brief with absolute dates, a Comparisons section, and direct source links.
evals.expected_output: A structured markdown brief comparing the latest public developer pricing information from at least three direct sources, with absolute dates and explicit source links.
assertions: The report starts with an H1 title.
The report includes a Comparisons section.
The report includes a Sources section.
The report references OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini.
The report contains at least three direct source links.
The report includes at least two absolute dates.

checks.assertion: The run completed successfully.
The report starts with an H1 title.
The report includes a Comparisons section.
The report includes a Sources section.
The report references OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini.
The report contains at least three direct source links.
The report includes at least two absolute dates.

evals.prompt: Analyze the latest public information about Model Context Protocol server hosting options and browser automation MCP servers. Produce a markdown brief with key findings, comparisons, caveats, and direct source links.
evals.expected_output: A structured markdown brief that compares current MCP hosting or browser automation options, explicitly includes caveats, and links directly to the sources.
assertions: The report includes Key Findings, Comparisons, Counterexamples and Caveats, and Sources sections.
The report mentions Model Context Protocol or MCP explicitly.
The report contains at least three direct source links.
The report includes at least one absolute date.

checks.assertion: The run completed successfully.

The report includes a Sources section.
The report mentions Model Context Protocol or MCP explicitly.
The report contains at least three direct source links.
The report includes at least one absolute date.

evals.prompt: Research a current topic where vendor documentation or announcements could reasonably disagree or evolve quickly in the AI tooling ecosystem. Produce a markdown brief that highlights uncertainty, caveats, open questions, and direct source links with absolute dates.
evals.expected_output: A structured markdown brief that surfaces conflicting or evolving guidance, calls out uncertainty clearly, includes open questions, and links directly to the cited sources.
assertions: The report includes Counterexamples and Caveats, Open Questions, and Sources sections.
The report explicitly mentions uncertainty or conflicting guidance.
The report contains at least three direct source links.
The report includes at least one absolute date.
